name: How much can I get for a neck injury settlement in Utah?

mainEntity.name: How much can I get for a neck injury settlement in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Settlements vary widely from a few thousand dollars for strains to over $100,000 for severe disc injuries requiring surgery. Your payout depends on your wage, impairment rating, and future medical needs.
